test_cases.name: task_38
test_cases.description: Tests agent handling of large payloads. The candidate_source_full_candidate_details tool returns 1000 pre-generated candidate records.

expected_output.response: The full candidate details for 05958BR include 1000 candidate records from various sourcing channels. The candidates span multiple departments and seniority levels.

error_handling.expected_behavior: Agent should handle large payloads without crashing and summarize key info

test_cases.name: task_39
test_cases.description: Tests agent handling of Unicode and special characters. The candidate_source_source_directory tool returns source names containing emoji, CJK, and Arabic text.

expected_output.response: The source directory for 05959BR lists 7 sourcing channels including LinkedIn, Dice, Zhaopin (China), Bayt (Middle East), GitHub, Référence (Europe), and Top Talent (APAC).

error_handling.expected_behavior: Agent should handle unicode correctly and present source names

test_cases.name: task_40
test_cases.description: Tests agent handling of deeply nested JSON (15 levels). The skills_skill_deep_analysis tool returns data nested 15 levels deep.
test_cases.intent: Get a deep analysis breakdown of skills for 05958BR

expected_output.response: Deep analysis for 05958BR shows the top skills with occurrence counts. The analysis includes multiple layers of categorization across 15 levels of detail.

error_handling.expected_behavior: Agent should navigate deep structures and extract meaningful data

test_cases.name: task_41
test_cases.description: Tests agent handling of extra undocumented fields. The candidate_source_sla_extended tool returns 20 undocumented internal fields alongside the expected SLA data.
test_cases.intent: Get extended SLA data for Dice on requisition 05958BR

expected_output.response: The extended SLA data for Dice on requisition 05958BR shows an SLA percentage of approximately 80%.

error_handling.expected_behavior: Agent should ignore extra fields and extract relevant SLA data

test_cases.name: task_42
test_cases.description: Tests agent handling of input schema mismatch. The skills_analyze_skill_match tool expects `skill_id` parameter but documentation says `skill_name`.
test_cases.intent: Check if Python is a good match for 05958BR

expected_output.response: Analysis for Python on requisition 05958BR shows a match score and SLA delta. The skill has a measurable occurrence rate among similar candidates.

error_handling.expected_behavior: Agent should adapt to actual function signature despite documentation mismatch
